use_cases: Interactive buttons that reveal secondary information on hover
CTA buttons with flip animation effects for engagement
Buttons that toggle between two states on user interaction
Form submit buttons with confirmation reveal animations
Product action buttons with animated state transitions
ai_summary: A flip button component using CSS 3D transforms and Framer Motion library. Features configurable flip directions (top, bottom, left, right) with spring physics animation. Provides hover-activated flip reveal for secondary text with tap scaling feedback. Supports customizable front/back text and styling classes for flexible integration.
